title: gliricidia meistophylla
intro: Gliricidia meistophylla, also known as Gliricidia subaurea, is a plant species native to tropical regions in Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Gliricidia meistophylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Gliricidia meistophylla are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
